summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zoho Booking modal functionality. All Book Now buttons now open modals with embedded Zoho Booking widgets instead of navigating to new pages. Previous fixes (watermark removal, dropdown arrows removal, navigation scroll) remain functional.
passed_tests: Services Grid Book Now buttons open modals with Zoho Booking widgets
Modal headers display correct service title, duration, and price
Close buttons work correctly on all booking modals
WorkWithMePage Book Now buttons open modals with Zoho Booking widgets
Zoho widgets load successfully (10-15 second load time as expected)
Previous fixes maintained: no watermark, no dropdown arrows
Tools dropdown navigation (Meditations, Programs) works correctly
ZohoBookingEmbed component loads script dynamically and calls Bookings.inlineEmbed()
